falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,800 on any single day within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break of the August 2024 low invalidates the 78% bottom pattern match, as that pattern required holding the structural low; this would confirm continuation lower not bottoming

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained volatility spike contradicts the BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 (moderate fear, not capitulation); scores above 50 typically accompany true bottoms, but 3 days above 35 would indicate panic escalation inconsistent with a completed bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 4.75% and holds there for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sharp rates breakout would signal renewed inflation/policy fears, breaking the macro relief dynamics that typically accompany August 2024-style bottoms where rates stabilized/fell; this invalidates the underlying macro premise of the pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
